conservative.name: Soothing Voice
conservative.requirements: 4 favour, the ability to speak. Your targets must hear you, but need not understand you

success.description: You speak calmly and softly. Each living creature that can hear you recovers 1 stress and will generally perceive you more favorably. If appropriate, this may influence the target
As above, plus while this card is recharging, living creatures that can hear and understand you add to their dice pools for any hostile action that include you as a target

boon.description: You may move your Party Tension meter 1 space to the left

bane.description: Move your Party Tension meter 1 space to the right
